label: three_stage/PatientPortal/trial_01/repeat_02
governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). Note: records write operation is not assigned to any child, which is acceptable as the parent's records write requirement may be satisfied by external medical record creation processes not modeled in this decompositio
